title: Memory Foam Bath Mat Set, 3-Piece Absorbent Water-Resistant Non-Slip Bath Mats (Beige, 40*60 + U50*50 + 50*80cm)
features: 🛀Ultimate Comfort: Step onto luxury with our 3-piece bath mat set, including sizes 80*50+U50*60+60*40cm. Crafted from thickened memory foam, these bathroom mats cradle your feet in unparalleled soft comfort, making every bath time a blissful experience

🛀Super Water Absorption: Keep your floors dry and your comfort at a peak with the highly absorbent properties of our bath mats. Each rug quickly soaks up moisture, leaving your bathroom clean and free from water spills

🛀Non-Slip Safety: Our bath mat non-slip feature ensures your safety by minimizing the risk of slipping post-shower. The PVC backing holds the mat firmly in place, providing peace of mind for you and your loved ones

🛀Easy Clean Convenience: Simplify your cleaning routine with our machine washable and dryer friendly bathroom mats. They're designed to maintain their plush softness and vivid colors wash after wash, saving you time and effort

🛀Versatile Use: This perfect bath mat set complements any bathroom decor and serves multiple purposes. Beyond the bathroom, they're ideal for use in the kitchen, by the bedside, or any area that requires a touch of comfort and style

specifications_table.Special Features: ‎Absorbent, Non Slip, Quick Dry, Soft and Comfortable, Washable
